local_help.man:
GALLETA(1)         extract information from MSIE cookie files        GALLETA(1)

NAME
     galleta - tool to extract information from MSIE cookie files

SYNOPSIS
     galleta [-t] FILE

DESCRIPTION
     galleta is a tool to extract valuable information (from a forensics inves-
     tigator point of view) from MSIE cookie files.

     It  will  extract  the  website name, the variables names and values.  The
     creation and expire time for these variables and also flags.

OPTIONS
     -t FD
         Change the default field delimiter (TAB) to FD.

     <file>
         Cookie file to parse.

AUTHOR
     This manual  page  was  written  by  Christophe  Monniez  <christophe.mon-
     niez@fccu.be> for the Debian project (but may be used by others).

1.0+20040505                       2008-03-10                        GALLETA(1)

apt_metadata.description:
Internet Explorer cookie forensic analysis tool
Galleta is a forensics tool that examines the content of cookie files
produced by Microsoft Internet Explorer (MSIE). It parses the file and
outputs a field separated that can be loaded in a spreadsheet.

use_cases: When you need Kali Linux, use galleta because galleta - tool to extract information from MSIE cookie files.
When you need a concrete invocation, run `galleta [-t] FILE` as documented upstream for galleta.
When chaining Kali Linux tools, pair galleta with sibling catalog entries sharing its attack_surface/phase_hint.
When validating lab setup, run `galleta --help` (or the README entrypoint) and confirm required hardware/deps from the catalog.

arguments.name: -t
arguments.description: Change the default field delimiter (TAB) to FD.
